rulings.Case Title: DAMIAN ESPARZA VS. SG COWEN SECURITIES CORP. et al
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT SG COWEN SECURITIES CORP. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANT- SUMMARY JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF CANNOT ESTABLISH CAUSES OF ACTION 1,2,3, & 5 BECAUSE UNDER HORN FAILED TO PRESENT SUBSTANTIAL RESPONSIVE EVIDENCE SHOWING PRETEXT.CAUSES OF ACTION 4 & 10 BECAUSE DEFENDANT HAD GROUNDS TO DISCHARGED PLAINTIFF ON AT WILL EMPLOYEE.CAUSES OF ACTION 6 & 7 BECAUSE EMPLOYMENT AT SG COWEN WAS AT WILL.CAUSE OF ACTION 8 BECAUSE NO UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICE.9TH CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE PLAINTIFF ADMITS IN DEPOSITION HE NEEDED TO BE EMPLOYED TO RECEIVE BONUS.PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PER CCP 437C(G).(302/REQ/PB)
